ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the restaurant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or type of cuisine served */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the restaurant's website */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cuisine served */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of images of the restaurant */,
  "owner_id" TEXT /* ID of the restaurant owner */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the restaurant (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Star rating given by the user */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., review, feedback) */,
  "food_quality_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for food quality */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for service */,
  "ambiance_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for ambiance */,
  "value_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for value for money */,
  "dishes" TEXT /* List of dishes tried during the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "images" TEXT /* URLs of images uploaded with the review */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant owner's response to the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "favorite_restaurants" TEXT /* List of favorite restaurants */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or brief description */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* Reference to the review being voted on */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user casting the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., cool, useful, funny) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "average_stars" REAL /* Average star rating for the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews submitted for the restaurant */,
  "food_quality_score" REAL /* Average food quality score */,
  "service_score" REAL /* Average service score */,
  "ambiance_score" REAL /* Average ambiance score */,
  "value_score" REAL /* Average value for money score */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the ratings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., American, Italian) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant offering the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The end date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" INTEGER /* Discount percentage offered in the promotion */,
  "discount_amount" INTEGER /* Discount amount offered in the promotion */,
  "minimum_spend" INTEGER /* Minimum spend required to avail the promotion */,
  "terms_conditions" TEXT /* Terms and conditions of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the business */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the restaurant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the restaurant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the restaurant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the restaurant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the restaurant */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the restaurant location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the restaurant location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants_categories" (
  "business_id" TEXT /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_id" TEXT /* Reference to the review they wrote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "review_id")
)
